    DAVID PINTO-
    DUSCHINSKY

    Proud to represent Burnt Oak, Colindale,

    Edgware, Hendon, Mill Hill and West Hendon

    Get in touch with me on david.pintoduschinsky.mp@parliament.uk

    ​

    CLICK HERE

    About me

    Since July 2024, it has been the honour of my life to serve as your MP.  I am committed to serving you and your family and fighting hard every day for every single one of my constituents.

    Read More

    Latest news

    My job is to listen to you and take action on the issues that matter most to our community. Check out the records of what I’ve been working on, in Parliament and across our constituency

    Read More

    Sign-up
    to my newsletter

    Sign up to my newsletter to stay up to date with my work in our community, and receive updates on upcoming events. It's the best way to stay connected with our community.

    Sign-up here

    Keep in touch

    Every week I help hundreds of local constituents and respond to thousands of emails and letters. Please don’t hesitate to get in touch.

    CONTACT MY OFFICE

    Need help or have an issue to raise? I’m here to listen.

    ​

    Every week I help hundreds of constituents and respond to thousands of emails and letters. I also hold regular surgeries across our constituency to speak with residents directly.

    ​​

    If you’re facing a problem, want to share your views, or need support with something, please don’t hesitate to get in touch.

    ​

    ​

    ​​

    Write to me: David Pinto-Duschinsky MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA

    Email: david.pintoduschinsky.mp@parliament.uk

    Phone: 020 7219 7280
